name: harness
description: Harness — agent-first development toolkit. The `harness-codex` plugin ships every Harness skill (auto-discovered by Codex via the manifest's skills field) and the harness MCP server. Sibling plugins (`harness-claude`, `harness-cursor`, `harness-gemini`) target the other major AI coding tools.

plugins.name: harness-codex
plugins.description: Harness for Codex CLI: every Harness skill (auto-discovered) plus the harness MCP server. Codex's plugin spec doesn't define a slash-command surface or an agents field, so skills + MCP are the entire surface; persona behavior is reachable via `harness.run_persona` (MCP). Lifecycle hooks are deferred until the Codex hooks schema is documented.
